# Purpose
This code defines a simple JavaScript function named [`run_me`](<#pebble-firmware/sdk/defaults/lib/librun_me>) that logs the message "Look at me, I'm running!" to the console. The function is then exported using `module.exports`, making it available for use in other modules. This code provides narrow functionality, serving as a basic example of a function that can be executed to produce a console output. It is suitable for use in environments that support CommonJS module syntax, such as Node.js.
